title: ShapeCode33
description: ShapeCode33: A reinforcement bar with shape code 33 to BS 8666:2020 in the XY Plane centred on the Origin, the A/C parameters aligned with the X axis and the B parameter aligned with the Y axis.

A.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

B.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

C.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Diameter.description: The diameter of the reinforcement bar. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BendRadius.description: Bend radius used for any discontinuities in the CentreCurve. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
